hero.headline: 30+ Years Keeping Orlando Pools Perfect
hero.subheadline: When your pool needs more than just a guy with a net, call the licensed commercial pool builder that other pool companies call for advice. Professional Poolcare has been Central Florida's trusted pool experts since 1993.
checkmarks: Live person always answers the phone
Online portal for service logs & billing

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> Cleaning to Construction
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to full pool builds, we handle every aspect of pool ownership so you can focus on enjoying your backyard oasis.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Dependable weekly service including skimming, brushing, vacuuming, and precise chemical balancing. Your pool stays swim-ready every single week.

cards.title: Pool Repair & Equipment
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, filters, heaters, salt systems, lights, timers, and robotic cleaners. Most repairs completed same-visit.

cards.title: Leak Detection
cards.description: Professional leak detection services to find and fix leaks in your pool structure, plumbing, or equipment before they become costly problems.

cards.title: Pool Resurfacing
cards.description: Restore your pool's beauty with premium resurfacing options. We use high-quality materials to give your pool a fresh, long-lasting finish.

cards.title: Renovations & Remodeling
cards.description: Transform your pool with new tile, deck upgrades, water features, LED lighting, and modern design updates. Make your backyard a resort.

cards.title: New Pool Construction
cards.description: Custom pool design and construction by a licensed commercial pool builder. Including Blue Hawaiian fiberglass pool installations.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Perfect Pool

steps.title: Call or Request a Quote
steps.description: A real person answers every call. Tell us about your pool and we'll schedule a free on-site assessment. No phone trees, no voicemail runarounds.

steps.title: We Take It From Here
steps.description: Our experienced technicians arrive on schedule and handle everything. Track your service through our online portal with photos, chemical readings, and service logs.

steps.title: Dive In and Relax
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready year-round. If anything ever needs attention, we're just a phone call away and a real person will answer.

about.label: Why Orlando Trusts Us
about.headline: The Pool Expert Other Pool Companies Call for Advice
about.description: Founded in 1993 by licensed commercial pool builder Pete DeGregory, Professional Poolcare has spent three decades earning Central Florida's trust. Pete is regularly consulted by other pool company owners on complex repair issues. We built our reputation on improved communication, courtesy, and attention to detail because your pool deserves more than guesswork.

features.title: Online Client Portal
features.description: View service logs, chemical readings, invoices, and make credit card payments through your personal online portal anytime.

features.title: A Real Person Answers Every Call
features.description: No call centers, no voicemail mazes. You'll always reach a live person who can help you right away.

features.title: Photo-Documented Service
features.description: We photograph all pool equipment and digitally track every route and service visit for complete transparency and accountability.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every pool is different. Contact us for a custom quote based on your pool's size, features, and service needs. No contracts required.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Promise
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us and a real person will answer. We'll come back and make it right at no extra charge. With 30+ years of experience, we've built our reputation on doing the job right the first time, and standing behind our work when you need us.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start weekly service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are added to our route within one week. We'll start with a comprehensive pool and equipment inspection so we know exactly what your pool needs from day one.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service visits?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most clients provide gate access and we handle everything. You can review exactly what was done through your online portal, including chemical readings and service notes.

faqs.question: Are your technicians licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. We are a licensed commercial pool contractor (CPC1459913), bonded, and fully insured. Our owner holds a state contractor registration and is recognized as a HomeAdvisor Elite Service provider.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Orange, Seminole, and North Osceola counties including Orlando, Longwood, Altamonte Springs, Winter Park, Lake Mary, Oviedo, Sanford, Casselberry, Maitland, Winter Springs, and Windermere.

faqs.question: Can you build a new pool?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our owner Pete DeGregory is a licensed commercial pool builder. We offer custom pool design and construction including Blue Hawaiian fiberglass pool installations. From concept to first splash.

testimonials.name: Robert P.
testimonials.text: I have used Professional Pool Care for 5 or 6 years with NEVER a complaint. Pete DeGregory is ALWAYS TRUE TO HIS WORD. You can count on this team to deliver.

testimonials.name: Brian W.
testimonials.text: I have enjoyed the service of Professional Poolcare for close to 10 years and have no complaints. Pete handles all issues in a very professional manner at a reasonable price.

testimonials.name: Kim P.
testimonials.text: Professional Pool Care has serviced me with my pool heater repair needs since 2013. They are quick, reliable, professional and very helpful. I wouldn't trust anyone else.
